asset_class.description: Which asset class this applies to.

total_cash.description: Sum of all USD held in the account.

cash_reserved_for_options_contracts.description: Cash held aside for open short option positions and orders.

pending_deploys_cash.description: Negative indicates $ is net raised from pending deploys, positive $ is net spent. This $ is included in `buying_power`.

pending_withdrawals.description: Negative indicates $ is in outgoing transfers. This $ is included in `buying_power`. Replaced by `pending_net_deposits`.

pending_net_deposits.description: Net pending account transfers. Negative indicates $ is in outgoing transfers (withdrawals), positive $ is in incoming transfers (deposits). Pending withdrawals are deducted from buying power, pending deposits are not added to buying power until settlement.

symphony_buying_power.description: How much $ is available to invest in symphonies of `asset_class`? Includes queued symphony invests and withdrawals. Can exceed `daytrading_buying_power` because we enforce day trade margin call protection on entry for symphonies by allocating the remainder to symphony cash.

direct_trading_buying_power.description: How much $ is available to open new buy orders of `asset_class`? Includes queued symphony invests, but not withdrawals. Can exceed `daytrading_buying_power` only when DTMC protection on entry is not enforced..

direct_trading_daytrading_buying_power.description: Direct trading DTBP net of current symphony cash and queued symphony invests, but not withdrawals. Useful for enforcing DTMC protection on exit.

pattern_day_trader_eligible.description: Whether the account + asset class is eligible for pattern day trading.

pattern_day_trader.description: Whether the account + asset class is designated for PDT, indicating the daytrading buying power is enforced.

daytrading_blocked.description: Regardless of the `pattern_day_trader` designation, daytrading is blocked when the account's equity is below $25k either intraday or overnight.

daytrade_margin_call_protection_on_entry.description: Whether day trade margin call protection on entry is being enforced for the account + asset class at the current time. When engaged, all buys will fail if their expected notional amount exceeds the current daytrading buying power.

daytrade_margin_call_protection_on_exit.description: Whether day trade margin call protection on exit is being enforced for the account + asset class at the current time. When engaged, if day trading buying pwoer is negative, all sells will fail if they would complete a day trade.

daytrading_buying_power.description: Current DTBP, describing the remaining notioinal in discretionary buys allowed without risking daytrading margin calls. Equivalent to day trade margin call protection on entry, in Alpaca's terminology.

current_equity_for_dtbp.description: The current value of equity used to determine PDT eligibility.

sod_equity_for_dtbp.description: The SOD value of equity used to determine SOD DTBP.

buying_power_constrained_when_daytrading.description: Whether actual intraday symphony buying power is constrained by the account's current daytrading buying power.

options_details.description: Details of the options contract (only for OPTIONS assets)

strike_price.description: Strike price of the option contract.

expiry.description: Expiry date of the option contract.

contract_type.description: Type of option contract, CALL or PUT.

underlying_price.description: The current price of the underlying asset.

underlying_price_todays_change.description: The $ change in the price of the underlying asset today.

underlying_price_todays_change_percent.description: The % change in the price of the underlying asset today.

price.description: The current price of this asset.

price_todays_change.description: The $ change in the price of this asset today.

price_todays_change_percent.description: The % change in the price of this asset today.

direct.description: The allocation of this holding held directly by the account.

symphony.description: The aggregate allocation of this holding across all symphonies.

symphonies.description: The allocation of this holding within each symphony.

allocation.description: The percentage of the symphony's total value that is allocated to this holding.

value.description: The current market value of this holding in the symphony.

notional_value.description: For options, the value of underlying assets controlled by the contract. For other assets, the value of the asset.

todays_change_percent.description: Today's gain/loss in % for this asset.

todays_change.description: Today's gain/loss in $ for this asset.

total_change_percent.description: Total gain/loss in % for this asset. Only provided for Alpaca accounts.

total_change.description: Total gain/loss in $ for this asset. Only provided for Alpaca accounts.

cost_basis.description: Total cost basis for this asset. Only provided for Alpaca accounts.

average_cost_basis.description: Per-share cost basis for this asset. Only provided for Alpaca accounts.

get.summary: Get search API keys
get.description:
Generates API keys used to search our Algolia indexes By default, Algolia only provides a master search key which lets a holder search any index. However, this doesn't give us any control to restrict access to specific indexes (e.g. blocking users from accessing the staging search indexes in prod, or requiring certain search parameters when searching an index). This endpoint generates index-specific search API keys which have expiry times and are safe to share with the front end.

 https://www.algolia.com/doc/guides/security/api-keys/#secured-api-keys

get.summary: Get search API keys
get.description:
Generates API keys used to search our Algolia indexes By default, Algolia only provides a master search key which lets a holder search any index. However, this doesn't give us any control to restrict access to specific indexes (e.g. blocking users from accessing the staging search indexes in prod, or requiring certain search parameters when searching an index). This endpoint generates index-specific search API keys which have expiry times and are safe to share with the front end.

 https://www.algolia.com/doc/guides/security/api-keys/#secured-api-keys

get.description: If the user is not authorized to view the market data, a 403 error will be returned.

parameters.name: range_date_from
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) or milliseconds timestamp to query. Either range_date_from or range_preset must be provided.

parameters.name: range_date_to
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD) or milliseconds timestamp to query. Default: current time.

parameters.name: range_preset
parameters.description: Time period to query, before range_date_to. Either range_date_from or range_preset must be provided.

If the user is not authorized to view the market data, a 403 error will be returned. None of the response fields are guaranteed to be present (except for 'symbol'). Usually, equities will have all fields.

post.summary: Execute a wheel trade (open/close option, sell shares)
post.description:
Unified endpoint for wheel trades.
                          position_intent determines the operation:
                          - SELL_TO_OPEN: Sell to open a put or call
                          - BUY_TO_CLOSE: Buy to close current option
                          - SELL: Sell all shares of underlying
